name: claudex-power-commands
description: 5 power commands for Claude Code and Codex: /check (5-angle parallel code review), /cowork (Agent Teams parallel orchestration), /super (idea-to-deployment pipeline), /docs (systematic documentation), /design (3-dial frontend design). Built-in verification, code quality, security, and git rules. Integrates with Anthropic Official plugins, PM Suite, and taste-skill.
